title: FinalGateAdvisory
description: Schema for a FinalGateAdvisory — advisory recommendation only. Not Apply Gate, not app authority, does not mutate state, does not send externally, does not certify correctness.

response_packet_ref.description: Reference to the ResponsePacket being evaluated

candidate_artifact_ref.description: Reference to the candidate artifact being evaluated

critic_cascade_ref.description: Reference to the critic cascade results

tournament_ref.description: Reference to the tournament selection results

decision_recommendation.description: Advisory recommendation — not a binding decision, not app authority

block_reasons.description: Reasons for block recommendation, if any

warning_reasons.description: Reasons for warning recommendation, if any

required_human_review.description: Items that require human review before app acceptance

is_apply_gate.description: Must be false — Final Gate Advisory is never Apply Gate

is_app_authority.description: Must be false — Final Gate Advisory is never app authority

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — this advisory cannot certify correctness, safety, or production readiness

candidate_only.description: Must be true — advisory is candidate guidance, never binding app decision

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this advisory does not claim or prove
